title: dombeya cincinnata var. stuhlmannii
intro: Dombeya cincinnata var. stuhlmannii, also known as the Stuhlmann's dombeya, is a plant species within the family Malvaceae, native to the tropical regions of Africa. The medicinal properties of Dombeya cincinnata var. stuhlmannii include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Dombeya cincinnata var. stuhlmannii include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
